summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureComm Discord replacement app - Stage 1-3 MVP. Backend API testing achieved 100% success rate with all endpoints working correctly. Frontend testing confirmed all core flows including registration, login, server creation, and navigation are functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with JWT cookies
Frontend: Landing page loads with nav and hero
Frontend: Login flow works with admin credentials
Frontend: Main app loads with server sidebar, DM list, friends list
Frontend: Server creation dialog and functionality
Frontend: Navigation between DMs, servers, and friends
